text:
Created attachment 178948
phplist_update_to_3.2.7

There is new version of PHPLIST. I'm attaching patch which updates port. New version was tested with poudriere - you can check log at http://uld.bsdserwis.com/pkg/data/10x64-testing/2017-01-15_08h54m11s/logs/phplist-3.2.7.log

I hope this patch will be applied soon :-)))
